title: amaranthus × ozanonii subsp. romanus
intro: Amaranthus × ozanonii subsp. romanus, also known as Roman amaranth or ozanon's amaranth, is a plant species within the amaranth family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties. Amaranthus × ozanonii subsp. romanus can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
